evidence: I have purchased 4 different Kari Anderson workout DVDs and very glad I did.
It's broken into 20 minute segments which makes it much easier to do.
I like that the moves are not just replicas of similar moves.
The cardio dance sections are paced quite fast.
It's paced very quickly.... which it should be but it's not for beginners.
The instructors cue exceptionally well and they are fun too!
Kari Anderson... her cueing is always on target.
I have lots of Tracey Mallett workouts.
I have most of Leah's Ballet Body workouts.
Your heart rate will be jacked up.
You will sweat! Your heartrate will go up!
It's a commitment to you. It's a great workout.

summary: The user has a strong preference for fitness and workout DVDs, particularly those that are fast-paced and well-cued by experienced instructors. They value high production quality and show loyalty to specific fitness brands and instructors, indicating a commitment to their fitness journey.
